✘ [ERROR] Could not resolve "missing-pkg"

    src/foo.ts:3:23:
      3 │ import { x } from "missing-pkg";
        ╵                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~

  You can mark the path "missing-pkg" as external to exclude it from the bundle.

         ╵ ^

1 error
